title: Unit, Property, Replay, Headless SDL, Render, and Playtest Evidence · Runtime Lens: Property Changed Tests
summary: Tests assert implementation details, use real time and global random state, compare one screenshot, never inject failures, and call dummy video proof of usability. Predict player-visible behavior, state, units, timing, input, rendering, feedback, failure, accessibility, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the property changed tests increment in risk-layered automated and human game test suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory,…
objectives: Generate bounded cases for wrap, collision symmetry, conservation, reconciliation, replay, and invalid input and retain smallest failures.
Test vector, wrap, time, input, state, score, collision, spawn, and migration invariants with fixed fixtures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A worked example Asteroids team handles case 7461 during an offline cross-platform release rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to layer pure unit and property tests, deterministic replay, headless SDL integration, render contracts, changed defects, and manual accessibility playtests; record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, playtest observation, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner; then cross both screen seams in one update and retain collision and rendering continuity. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Generate bounded cases for wrap, collision symmetry, conservation, reconciliation, replay, and invalid input and retain smallest failures. A defensible solution applies Property Changed Tests, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to risk-layered automated and human game test suite.

content.code:
# Worked focus: asteroids-property-changed-tests — Generate bounded cases for wrap, collision symmetry, conservation, reconciliation, replay, and invalid input and retain smallest failures.
# Evidence: asteroids-worked-asteroids-testing-headless-fixtures-2
# Competency: asteroids-worked-asteroids-testing-headless-fixtures-2.
# Case 7417: a headless continuous-integration replay.
# Operating constraint: record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, playtest observation, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: replay the same input trace at 30, 60, and 144 presentation frames per second and compare simulation state.
def worked_asteroids_testing_headless_fixtures_2(unit_cases: int = 24, property_cases: int = 40, headless_cases: int = 9, changed_defect_detected: bool = True, dummy_driver_verified: bool = True, render_contract_checked: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "playerworked2",
        "seed7417",
        "input2dekrow",
        "frameworked27417",
        "state7417worked2",
        "playtest2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if min(unit_cases, property_cases, headless_cases) < 1:
        return False, unit_cases, "test-layers"
    if not changed_defect_detected:
        return False, unit_cases, "mutation-survived"
    if not dummy_driver_verified:
        return False, headless_cases, "headless-gap"
    if not render_contract_checked:
        return False, headless_cases, "render-gap"
    total = unit_cases + property_cases + headless_cases
    assert total >= 3
    return True, total, "risk-layered-game-tests"
content.caption: Runnable deterministic pure-Python Asteroids decision model; trace one accepted and one rejected frame, input, seam, collision, cue, save, package, or release case, then state which native pygame-ce, SDL, display, controller, audio, filesystem, GPU, accessibility playtest, installer, performance, recovery, or publication claim still needs controlled transfer evidence.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A theory Asteroids team handles case 5617 during a headless continuous-integration replay. Build deterministic Python evidence to layer pure unit and property tests, deterministic replay, headless SDL integration, render contracts, changed defects, and manual accessibility playtests; test empty, zero-vector, seam, low-frame-rate, focus-loss, device-loss, missing-asset, corrupted-save, and rejected cases; then replay the same input trace at 30, 60, and 144 presentation frames per second and compare simulation state. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Generate bounded cases for wrap, collision symmetry, conservation, reconciliation, replay, and invalid input and retain smallest failures.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Random tests are useful even without reproducible seeds or invariants.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Generate bounded cases for wrap, collision symmetry, conservation, reconciliation, replay, and invalid input and retain smallest failures. Artifact under review: risk-layered automated and human game test suite.

options.text: The Property Changed Tests record says risk-layered automated and human game test suite looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the inspect property changed tests evidence boundary for Property Changed Tests.

For inspect property changed tests evidence, run one convenient high-frame-rate happy path, omit revision, seed, input and time trace, units, seams, device changes, entity reconciliation, multichannel cues, accessibility settings, failures, recovery, and desktop transfer, then accept a playable animation as Asteroids proof. This does not satisfy Property Changed Tests for risk-layered automated and human game test suite.
The record names the assumption, applies Property Changed Tests, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
